title: ANC - 8.-User starts the app and opens Settings>ANC while being in active call
scenario: User opens Settings > ANC during an active call, then leaves the call and verifies ANC/Transparency mode behavior.
expected: 1) ANC turns ON with previously selected option, Transparency Mode becomes greyed out and turned OFF. 2) Popup informs user this option is not available during call. 3) ANC turns OFF, Transparency Mode becomes accessible again and turns ON with previously selected option. 4) User can move between ANC and Transparency modes.
